name: Streetwear Stack
description: Youth-oriented stacked-headline tile. Subject(s) middle row, multi-line headline upper-left, CTA pill bottom-right.
gen_directive: Composition: one or two models (knee-cropped or three-quarter) occupy the middle row of the frame, set against a flat colored backdrop wall (sage, butter, terracotta, or washed primary). The upper-left quadrant must be visually quiet for a multi-line stacked headline. The lower-right corner must be quiet for a CTA pill. Slight 35mm grain texture, slightly desaturated. Streetwear youth aesthetic — confident, casual, anti-corporate.
placement_hint: This image was composed to the 'Streetwear Stack' template. The headline lives in the upper-left quadrant (roughly x=0.04, y=0.06, w=0.50, h=0.30), left-aligned, ideally broken into a stack of short lines (each on its own row). font_size_pct around 6-8. Use white text if the backdrop is mid-toned, soft drop-shadow or light halo scrim. The headline must NOT cross into the middle row where subjects sit.
